description: Style Note  arrow woman is right for every fashionista. Catering to your summer needs, they bring you these comfortable and trendy jumpsuits to be in with the current trends. Pair it with a pair of flats and accessorise ever so subtly for a casually comfortable look.  Product Details  Dark olive green sleeveless jumpsuit with a round neckline, has a broad waistband, pintucks from the waistband to give a pleated look and two insert pockets below the waistband Material and Care  95% viscose and 5% lycra  Warm wash with like colours  Use non chlorine bleach only when needed  Tumble dry  Use warm iron    b> Size and Fit  Regular fit  The model (height 5'8"and chest 33") is wearing a size M Style Note  arrow Woman is right for every fashionista.
